post.caption:
Ever wonder how Claude thinks? 🧠

Streaming responses lets you see the AI's reasoning process in real-time, not just the final answer. It's like watching someone think out loud!

#ClaudeAI #AITips #Productivity

story_data.tip_text: Stream Claude responses to see its thinking process unfold
story_data.subtext: Understanding how Claude builds answers helps you craft better prompts and catch logic gaps.
